title: Piquant Low-Carb Jamaican Chicken Stew
description: A floral, cheese-pull comforting Jamaican stew with a subtle sweetness and a rich, emulsified sauce made low-carb friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Toss in chicken cubes, season with allspice, thyme, paprika, and a pinch of salt, and brown for 5 minutes.
Add diced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Pour in coconut milk and lime juice, bring to a gentle simmer, and reduce heat to low.
Cook uncovered for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until chicken is tender and sauce thickens.
Remove from heat, stir in chopped cilantro, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with extra cilantro or lime wedges.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
